title: dolichos gululu
intro: Dolichos gululu, also known as the velvet bean, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a compound called L-tryptophan, an amino acid that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of dolichos gululu include its use in treating anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be taken orally or used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
